column1: # HF models used in burnembed benches should be
# resolved to a specific commit SHA so an upstream publisher's
# silent edit can't break our tests.
# `revision_sha_or_main` may be the literal string `main` if the
# revision hasn't been resolved yet — in which case the bench
# fetches whatever HEAD is. Run scripts/refresh-hf-lock.sh (planned
# Bench / test code reads this with read_lock(repo_id) → revision
